MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: SRavinantapricha/D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present. Represented by Leo Guzman.
Attorney Paul Hogarth appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Susan Wolfram is present.
Attorney Olivia Jenq representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Philip Keith, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-11-2011 is vacated.
